SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
